project_milestones.Kronos: V20 Geometric Thermodynamics consolidated. Shifted focus to adiabatic expansion detection and free energy auditing.
project_milestones.Curiosity: Complexity Gap (G) metrics research concluded and integrated into the global risk regulation spec.
project_milestones.PineStrategies: Finalized V20 series: Materialized Thermodynamic Breakout and WaveTrend strategies for Pine v6.

high_signal_insights.insight: AI 代理正從『邏輯生成』演化為『系統營運』，具備自我修復（Self-Healing）能力的指令集是主權穩定性的物理基礎。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 研究將 printer-offline-fix 等自動化修復邏輯轉化為 TeleNexus 的系統規訓模組。

high_signal_insights.insight: 絕熱擴張（Adiabatic Expansion）定義了高品質的趨勢延續性：高位移功配比低分形熵增。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 實施 G < 0.02 區域的相位坍縮保護，強制自動執行鎖定。

audit_memo: 今日（5/10）系統正式達成『主權主宰 V20 擴展期』的高密度蒸餾。透過將熱力學平衡（Kronos V20）與信息論複雜性（Curiosity G-Gap）對位，TeleNexus 構建了雙重物理防線。同時，吸納了 GitHub 獵頭中關於『Agent 權限邊界擴張』與『系統自癒』的前沿信號，為主權系統在底層基礎設施層面的演化提供了明確路徑。
